name: fairyteller_visuals
description: Generates the first chapter illustration with Gemini, stores it as a job file, writes visuals.json, and starts render/publish asynchronously.

parameters.jsonExample: {"jobId":"ft_example","order":{"illustrationStyle":"disney","heroes":[]},"text":{"preview":{"chapter":1,"summary":"Two heroes by the river with a compass","title":"Example"},"chapters":[]}}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { status: "visuals_ready", stage: "visuals", progress: 75, message: "Иллюстрация первой главы готова", preview: $("Restore Visuals After File Write").item.json.text.preview, visuals: $("Restore Visuals After File Write").item.json.visuals } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $('Restore Visuals After File Write').first().json;
return [{ json: payload }];

nodes.name: Generate Hero Reference Sheet with Gemini

parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $('Normalize Hero Reference Sheet').first().json;
return [{ json: payload }];

const payload = $('Build Hero Reference Sheet').first().json;
return [{ json: payload }];
